notes: Hand-traced approximation of Tsukuba Circuit (TC2000). Clockwise: front straight (south) -> First Hairpin (T1, right) -> short link -> S-curves and Dunlop area (right-left-right wiggle in the middle) -> infield esses -> back straight -> Final Corner (sweeping right) -> S/F. For accurate geometry, run scripts/generate_track_maps.py against the AC content folder.
